name: wled-usermod-auto-brightness
description: Ambient-light auto-brightness usermod for WLED: drives overall LED brightness from a BH1750FVI or VEML7700 I2C lux sensor (selectable or auto-detected) or an analog photocell/LDR, with dark-off, manual offset tracking, and optional MQTT / Home Assistant publishing.
keywords: wled, usermod, auto-brightness, ambient light, lux, bh1750, veml7700, photocell, ldr, analog, i2c, mqtt, home assistant, esp32
